# Healthy Research Repo

Keywords: reproducible experiments, example dataset, baseline method.

## Installation

Use Python 3.10 or newer.

```bash
python -m pip install -e .
```

## Usage

```bash
bash scripts/reproduce.sh
```

## Reproducibility

Run the reproduce script to regenerate the toy result from documented config.

## Data availability

See `data/README.md` for data access notes.

## Citation

Use the included `CITATION.cff`.
